---
title: "Bayesian Model Averaging with MCMC"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Bayesian Model Averaging with MCMC}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r load_data}
data("penguins")
head(penguins)
```

```{r full_model}
mass_breg_full = breg(body_mass ~ island*sex + flipper_len,
                      data = na.omit(penguins))
```

```{r check_full_model}
plot(mass_breg_full, type = "post_pred")
```

```{r create_bma_object}
mass_breg_bma = bma(mass_breg_full)
```

```{r print}
print(mass_breg_bma)
```

```{r, contrast}
contrast(mass_breg_bma, factors = c("island", "sex"), ref = "Biscoe male")
```

```{r}
model.frame.breg(mass_breg_full)
```

```{r term_probs}
summary(mass_breg_bma, type = "term_probs")
```

```{r term_odds}
summary(mass_breg_bma, type = "term_odds")
```

```{r model_probs}
summary(mass_breg_bma, type = "model_probs")
```

```{r model_odds}
summary(mass_breg_bma, type = "model_odds")
```

```{r est}
summary(mass_breg_bma, type = "est")
```
